item.title: Switch2全部新功能體驗！新遊戲好玩麼？ C鍵實測！遊戲效能如何？續航多久？｜大狸子切切裡
item.itunes:title: Switch2全部新功能體驗！新遊戲好玩麼？ C鍵實測！遊戲效能如何？續航多久？｜大狸子切切裡
item.itunes:author: 大狸子切切裡 Cherry OFFICIAL CHANNEL
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 深入了解任天堂 Switch 2 的設計巧思與內部構造，包括 Joy-Con 連接的巧妙設計。
  • 搶先一窺預載遊戲「Nintendo Switch 2 歡迎之旅」的內容與趣味之處，了解其如何展示新主機特色。
  • 掌握全新遊戲「瑪利歐賽車世界」的核心玩法，包括獨特的大世界探索模式與多人排位賽的體驗分享。
  • 了解 Switch 2 新增的語音聊天與螢幕分享功能，以及作者實際使用時遇到的設定與應用情境。

摘要

開箱趣聞與影片概述

故事從作者拿到 Switch 2 的趣事開始。他在趕製介紹影片時，不慎將附贈的瑪利歐賽車兌換碼曝光在影片中， رغم已經發現並嘗試挽救，但碼在短短十分鐘內就被他人領取，造成了損失。作者檢視了當天的拍攝畫面，證實了兌換碼確實曾出現在鏡頭裡，並自嘲是因為急著體驗實體卡帶遊戲，而完全忘記了數位兌換碼的存在。

本次影片主要聚焦在 Switch 2 的遊戲效能表現、「瑪利歐賽車」的樂趣、「Nintendo Switch 2 歡迎之旅」是否比想像中更有趣、新增 C 按鈕的用途，以及電池續航力等關鍵問題。作者表示，希望透過這支影片，讓觀眾能夠完整了解 Switch 2 的設計與遊戲體驗。

深入探索 Switch 2 的設計細節

作者首先分享了遊玩「Nintendo Switch 2 歡迎之旅」的感受，這款遊戲出乎他意料的有趣，讓他不知不覺玩了十多個小時。不過，他認為這款遊戲更像是任天堂寫給自己的「情書」，大部分內容都在展示 Switch 2 設計的精妙之處，對於只想單純玩遊戲的玩家而言，或許觀看影片了解即可。

遊戲中詳細解釋了 Switch 2 的許多設計細節，例如主機與 Joy-Con 連接處的巨大縫隙，這並非設計失誤，而是為了防止 Joy-Con 因槓桿原理在受力時意外脫落的重要間隙。由於沒有縫隙來產生扭動，Joy-Con 會變得非常難以拔出。

此外，Joy-Con 上的 SL 和 SR 按鈕下方其實只有兩片簡單的鐵片，是靠主機上的磁鐵吸附來固定。當磁鐵吸附時，按鈕會稍微向外突出。由於按鈕本身就設計成可移動的，這使得握持 Joy-Con 時會感到有些許晃動，是個有趣的设计。

作者也曾擔心過 Joy-Con 與主機連接針腳容易斷裂的問題，但 Nintendo 在設計時考慮到了這一點。遊戲中的動畫演示了連接器部分的巧妙結構：中间的連接部分設計得非常鬆散，即使 Joy-Con 發生扭轉，中間連接部分也不會隨之移動，內外都留有間隙，即使大力扭動也不容易折斷。有人實際嘗試過，确实非常堅固。

遊戲還介紹了 Joy-Con 上的光學感應器（被作者稱為滑鼠感應器），並指出佩戴腕帶和不佩戴時的對焦距離不同，因此特別客製化了鏡頭以確保準確對焦。通過近距離觀察，可以看到感應器內部有一個肉眼不可見、不斷閃爍的紅點。

電源與充電考量

提到充電，作者發現 Switch 2 不支援快速充電，並對此感到困惑。任天堂官方解釋這是為了延長電池壽命，例如充電時盡量不要充滿，並且快充更容易損壞電池，所以設計上不支援快充。作者對此理由表示質疑，畢竟這台大尺寸的遊戲機充電功率僅與 iPhone 8 相當，使用 60 瓦充電器也只能跑到 15 瓦，這種设计令人難以評價。

Welcome Tour 的趣味迷你遊戲與設計巧思

「Nintendo Switch 2 歡迎之旅」遊戲本身相當有趣，內含許多迷你遊戲，甚至可以邀請朋友一起挑戰。例如其中的幀率測試挑戰，專門設計給聲稱能區分 120 幀和 60 幀的玩家，讓他們測試能否一次全對。

遊戲透過不同區域從外到內展示 Switch 2 的結構。例如，它會告訴玩家為了讓肩部按鈕從任何角度都能按壓到，設計中增加了兩個彈簧。遊戲中甚至有個可愛的小人站在 Joy-Con 展示區裡，說著「是真的，這裡也有彈簧」。

另一個例子是進入 B 區時，遊戲會提醒該區域地面非常濕滑，跑太快可能會「咚」的一聲摔倒，這些细节增加了遊戲的趣味性。

遊戲中還有一個非常有趣的相機遊戲，內容是模仿表情。作者實際體驗後感到非常爆笑，並發現了利用露出眉毛來幫助辨識的技巧。遊戲需要辨識玩家的表情，並根據相似度給予評分。作者嘗試挑戰高難度表情，並分享了獲得高分和挑戰失敗的過程，展現了遊戲相機功能的趣味互動。

全新語音聊天與螢幕分享功能

本次 Switch 2 主打的一項新功能是語音聊天。透過新增的 C 按鈕，玩家可以與朋友分享自己的遊戲畫面。如果連接了攝像頭，甚至可以将自己的影像疊加到遊戲畫面上，看起來就像在開視訊會議。

然而，使用聊天功能有一個限制，必須綁定非中國大陸的手機號碼。作者嘗試綁定香港手機卡未果，最終請加拿大朋友代為綁定。初次開啟聊天功能時，需要選擇允許哪些朋友發起聊天。建立房間後，只有相互允許的朋友才能加入語音聊天。

在設定中，玩家可以選擇開啟或關閉攝像頭，並有多種螢幕佈局預設可選，除了直接的人物影像剪裁，還可以選擇氣泡窗口等樣式。

作者認為，雖然可能有人會質疑玩遊戲時是否真的會開鏡頭，但對於情侶一起玩遊戲或是玩 Splatoon 等合作對戰遊戲時，語音聊天和螢幕分享功能會非常實用。例如在 Splatoon 中，即使自己被擊倒，也能通過隊友的畫面了解敵人位置，實現「光明正大」的偷看螢幕，而無需語音報點。聊天功能也支援語音轉文字，但目前不支援中文。

旗艦遊戲：瑪利歐賽車世界

最後，作者談到了 Switch 2 唯一的首發旗艦遊戲「瑪利歐賽車世界」。他直接给出了結論：非常好玩。這兩天工作室的同事都無心工作，轮流在客廳裡激烈遊玩。

本次的「瑪利歐賽車世界」分為排位賽和大世界探索兩個部分。作者對大家更好奇的大世界探索進行了详细介紹。雖然遊戲確實為瑪利歐賽車創建了一個完整的大地圖，但它的「大世界」並不像薩爾達那樣無縫开放，更像是將以往的各種地圖做成了獨立的「箱庭世界」，再通過道路或航線連接起來。

有趣的是，本作瑪利歐賽車地圖的縱深感明顯增強，不僅可以在空中飛行或潛入水下，每個主题的「城市面貌」也都經過精心設計。在大世界中駕駛時，遠處的城市看起來就像巨大的遊樂園，極具吸引力。大世界中還散佈著一些迷你遊戲，例如開卡車亂撞、駕駛 UFO 吸牛等。玩家還可以在路邊便利店獲取特殊道具，第一次獲得時可以解鎖角色的新服裝。

至於排位賽，作者認為瑪利歐賽車與真人對戰時樂趣更甚，尤其是 24 人參與的「大獎賽模式」。

================================================

I've already got my hands on the Switch2 and have been playing it for a few days. A couple of days ago, we made an incredibly detailed video for you. That day, my editor and I worked through the night until eight in the morning. The video was uploaded just as I was about to go to bed. Then I saw a comment saying that the Mario Kart redemption code was visible. I quickly asked my buddy to salvage the situation. But in just 10 minutes,. it was already too late. I lost the Mario Kart code directly. I was also at fault for being eager to play the game. and using the physical cartridge,. completely forgetting about the redemption code. I even went back to check the footage from that day. Let me show you. The digital activation code for Mario. I'm not showing you that. Haha. I'm not showing you that. Take this away. So that we don't have to edit it out later. Don't lose it. Although we can find it in our video footage. Indeed, you really can find it in our video footage. Today's video is going to talk about. just how good the Switch2's gaming performance is. Is Mario Kart fun? Is Nintendo Switch 2 Welcome Tour actually more interesting than we thought? What's the purpose of the added C button? How's the battery life? Get a complete understanding of the Switch2's design and gaming experience in one video. Nintendo Switch 2 Welcome Tour, this game is actually more interesting than I imagined. I have been playing for more than ten hours without even realizing it. But I feel that this game is like a love letter Nintendo wrote to itself. Most of the content is like:. Come and have a look, everyone! The Switch I designed is just amazing. If you just want to buy it for fun, then don't bother. Just watch my video. For example, here. I was also puzzled when I first got it. Why is there such a big gap here? But. there's an official explanation for this. Take a close look. at the connection between the Nintendo Switch 2 console and the Joy-Con. This gap is actually very important. Why is that? Because this gap. makes it very difficult to remove the Joy-Con. Without this gap for it to twist,. the Joy-Con could easily be pulled off. due to the lever principle. And the magnets on the Joy-Con,. they're actually only on the console. The magnets on the console. hold onto these SL and SR buttons. These buttons. are actually just two simple pieces of iron. And when they're pulled up by the magnets,. the buttons will slightly move outward. And because they're buttons,. buttons are meant to move. So when holding the Joy-Con,. there's a bit of wiggle room. This design is quite interesting. And there's something I've always been worried about,. the issue of the connection pins when holding it. Nintendo's design has actually taken that into account. There's a very intuitive animation in the game. that shows us. how this connector part works.

This cyan part here,. it's actually very loosely held together like this. So when it twists,. the part that's connected in the middle. doesn't move with it. It's like they've left some clearance both inside and outside. Even if you apply a lot of force,. it won't easily break. And there's actually someone who's tried it,. and it really can't be broken. This part of the Joy-Con is the mouse sensor. And it says here,. when you're wearing the wrist strap and when you're not,. the focusing distance is different. So,. in order to make the camera focus properly,. they customized this lens. This part of the Joy-Con is its mouse sensor. And if we take a closer look,. you'll see a red dot inside. that keeps flashing,. which is invisible to the naked eye. And another funny thing is,. Nintendo says they don't support fast charging,. because it's to extend the battery life. For example, when charging,. try not to let it charge too full. And fast charging can damage the battery more easily. So we design it to not support fast charging. Is this the reason why your 60-watt charger. can only use 15 watts? For such a big gaming console,. the charging power. is on par with the iPhone 8. It's really hard to judge. Really. I think the entire game is quite fun. And there are so many mini-games inside. You can even invite friends to come and challenge together. For example, this frame rate test challenge. People who always say. they can tell the difference between 120 frames and 60 frames. should hurry up and give it a try. See if you can get them all right in one go. The game uses different zones. to showcase the structure of the Switch 2 from the outside in. For example,. it tells you here. that in order for the shoulder buttons to be pressed from every angle,. they added two springs. So here's a particularly cute detail. Inside the Joy-Con's exhibit area, there's a little man. He stands here and says,. "Really." "There is a spring here, too." For another example,. as soon as you enter Zone B,. he will remind you. that the ground in this area is very slippery. If you run too fast,. you might. "thump" and take a tumble. Next to the 4K TV experience zone,. some people are debating whether to buy a 4K TV. Maybe discuss it after getting home. In summary,. if you're interested in the design of the Switch itself,. you can give it a try. This time, Nintendo has a feature. that they're heavily promoting for the Switch2.

Voice chat. Through this C button, you can share your screen with your friends. It will share your gameplay to your friends' screens. If you have a camera,. you can even superimpose your face on it. It looks just like you are having a meeting. However,. to use the Chat function,. you must bind a non-mainland phone card. But,. for some reason, my Hong Kong phone card couldn't be bound. In the end, I had my friend in Canada bind it for me. When you first open the Chat function,. it will ask you to choose which friends you allow to chat with. After setting up a room,. only friends who have mutually allowed each other can join the voice chat. In the settings,. you can turn your camera on or off. There are also several presets for the screen layout. Besides the direct cutout for the camera figure,. you can also choose a bubble window. But have you ever thought about. when you play games with your friends,. would you really turn on the camera? It can even convert voice to text,. although it doesn't support Chinese yet. Actually, when I play games,. I really love playing with friends. Even if we're playing different games,. each doing our own thing,. it's still fun to chat together. If it's a couple playing games together,. this would be perfect. For example, if you're playing a cooperative PVP game like Splatoon,. it would be more interesting to see your teammate's perspective. When you're down, you can still watch your teammate attack the enermy. Just by watching your teammate's screen, you'll know where the enemies are. And there's no need to call out positions. Just legitimately peek the screen. There's also a very interesting camera game in Nintendo Switch 2 Welcome Tour. It's about imitating facial expressions. It really cracked me up. This camera,. there's a little flap here to cover it. Once it's turned on,. the camera light will come on. And I've tried it,. if I zoom like this,. it will track my face. Look! I found a trick. Because it needs to recognize your eyebrows,. you can expose your eyebrows. What kind of expression is this? Like this. A little higher. This angle. is too difficult. The eyebrows are not good enough. Still not enough. Ah. This one is good. I can do this. I have to look over here with my eyes. Oh, the angle's a bit high. Wow,. but they're all 20 points. 93 points totally! Amazing. Let's see the next one. This expression is just too wise. Hahaha. Wow, I'm so awesome.

Only lost 2 points. How can the eyebrows fly like that? They can actually fly out of the face. I feel like I'm going to cramp. My eyebrows can't fly out. The last one. The high-difficulty move, wink. Very close. Very close. Let's see if I can get three stars. Didn't get three stars. It's okay. I got it before. Haha. Let's talk about the only flagship game for this Switch2,. Mario Kart World. Let's come to the conclusion first. It's really fun. These past two days, my colleagues at the studio have no heart for work,. taking turns to play fiercely in the living room. This time, Mario Kart World is actually divided into two parts:. ranking races and big world exploration. Let's first talk about the big world exploration that everyone's more curious about. This time, Nintendo has indeed created a whole big map for Mario Kart World. But its big world is not like the kind in Zelda. It's more like various maps from before have been turned into separate box worlds. And these box worlds are connected through various roads and sea routes. What's interesting is,. I think the sense of depth in the Mario Kart maps is much stronger in this installment. And it's not just about flying in the sky and diving underground. The "city appearance" of each theme has also been carefully designed. When driving in the big world,. these cities look like huge amusement parks from afar,. super attractive. There are also some mini-games in the big world. For example, you can drive a truck around and crash into things. Life, can you just let me off the hook this once? Next life, I just want to be. a child that never grows up. someone who has people to keep warm with and rely on,. with not too many worries weighing on my mind. With the most innocent eraser,. I could just wipe away all the life's arguments. Life, can you just let me off the hook this once? Sometimes, I'm so tired,. yet I don't even know why I keep going. In Mario Kart, you can even drive a UFO and suck up all the cows. There's another cool thing about the big open world. you can grab a special item from a roadside convenience store. The first time you get it, you'll unlock a costume for your character. Now, let's talk about ranked races. Honestly,. Mario Kart is way more fun when you're playing with real people. Especially this Grand Prix mode,. where 24 players race together. The competition is seriously intense. That's how it was for me. I'd often be in the lead,. and then all of a sudden, I'd get bombarded with turtles, bombs, and lightning bolts,. and drop way down to like 10th place or beyond. By the way, here are some tips for new players. At the start of the race, it might be a good idea to hang back a bit. The random items you get in this game are based on your ranking. The lower your rank,. the more powerful items you can get. And focus on collecting as many coins as you can. Each coin gives you a 1% speed boost,. and you can stack up to 20 of them. Then, in the second half of the race, you can unleash a burst of speed. As for performance,. Nintendo players are finally getting a treat. In single-player mode,.

the big open world and ranked races run smoothly at 4K 60 frames per second. Even in high-load scenes, there's no frame drops. In two-player split-screen, the frame rate drops. a bit to around 50 FPS. And in four-player split-screen,. it drops even further to 30 FPS,. and the resolution also takes a hit. But for a party game,. the overall experience is still pretty good. Cyberpunk 2077 is a game I've been really looking forward to this time around. First off, it's absolutely crazy that. a 3A game like Cyberpunk 2077 can even run on the Switch. It's a great indicator of how future. third-party games might perform when ported to the Switch 2. There are also big titles like Elden Ring,. Red Dead Redemption 2. and I'm really worried about whether the Final Fantasy will run smoothly. When you actually put the Switch 2 in handheld mode next to two other mainstream handhelds,. in its performance mode, the native resolution is roughly around 540P - 480P. With DLSS, the output resolution is 720P,. aiming for a 40 FPS target. But in large-scale, high-load scenarios, it might drop to 30 - 35 FPS. The ROG Ally, on the other hand, just crushes it. with 1080P resolution,. leading the other two machines in both frame rate and graphical fidelity. Comparing the Switch 2 to the Steam Deck OLED,. since they use different textures,. they each have their strengths and weaknesses in terms of actual in-game graphics. The claimed tenfold performance boost of the Switch 2. includes Nvidia's DLSS upscaling algorithm. Nvidia's DLSS does indeed have fewer bugs compared to AMD's FSR. The Steam Deck OLED tends to have more. jaggies and aliasing in mobile scenarios. But. here's the thing to note:. the Switch 2's screen is nowhere near the same league as an OLED. It looks kind of dull and the image isn't as sharp as the Steam Deck's,. especially noticeable in certain areas. If you just look at the screen performance of these gaming devices,. the Switch 2 falls far short of the Steam Deck's screen in terms of comfort. There's even a big gap between it and the ROG Ally X, which also has an LCD screen. Foreign bloggers have tested and found that the Switch 2's peak brightness is only 400 - 450 nits,. and its HDR is just HDR10,. not what we'd consider true HDR. HDR1000. It is more like an entry-level HDR device. In TV mode, we compare it to other game consoles. In quality modes,. it actually outputs at 1080P. Compared to the PS5, there's a huge gap in both lighting effects and details. However, when compared to the XSS,. which outputs at 1440P,. the Switch 2 has better texture quality. and higher contrast,. with more noticeable lighting layers. You could say they're very close,. with each having its own advantages. In the Switch 2's quality mode,. it only supports partial ray tracing. Its load speeds are just about okay. Among consoles with SSDs, it's indeed on the slower side,. but it's way faster than the old-school HDD-equipped PS4. Now, let's talk about the actual gameplay experience:. The default version of the game doesn't support Chinese voiceovers. You'll need to download them from the Eshop. Just search for "2077" in the Eshop,. and you'll see all the language versions available. as free DLCs for download. By default, the Joy-Con mouse function isn't enabled in the game. We need to turn it on in the settings. The default sensitivity is set to 5,.

and even as a high-sensitivity FPS player, I found it way too fast. But you can adjust it to your liking. I set it to 2,. and let's give this gun recoil control a try. Hey, it works pretty well! While you can adjust the sensitivity for the guns,. the menus are super fast. I also tried tweaking the mouse sensitivity in the external settings. But here's the thing. the mouse sensitivity outside the game. doesn't affect the in-game settings at all. I never imagined a handheld console could be operated like this. Overall, I'm quite satisfied with the gaming experience. Even though I'm comparing it to other handhelds,. the Switch 2 is still way lighter and thinner than them. We've already tested the Switch 2's charging in a previous video. Whether you use a 100W charger or the original one,. it only charges at 15W via PD. It takes over two hours to fully charge. Battery life is also a big concern for everyone. When testing a brand-new machine running "The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom" on the Switch 2,. the battery lasted 3 hours and 45 minutes. For a high-load game like Cyberpunk 2077, running from 100% to empty,. it lasted 2 hours and 30 minutes. If we consider a 15% battery degradation after two years of use,. it might end up being around 3 hours for medium-load games. and 2 hours for heavy-load ones. It's just barely enough,. quite on the edge. There's one thing about the Switch 2 that I'm really excited about. I can finally play Zelda at a high frame rate! If you have an old save file that you're in the middle of,. you can transfer the entire data to the Switch 2. Nintendo knows that. just upgrading the graphics package isn't enough. So, they've come up with something new. the Zelda Notes app that links your phone with the Switch. First off, this Zelda Notes feature is only available in the "Tears of the Kingdom" Switch 2 version. And by default, it's turned off in the game. We need to enable it in the settings. and choose to use the Zelda Notes. One of the features is the Sound Memories,. which is kind of like the new Dragon's Tears. For example, when you're exploring the map,. it'll play a sound similar to when you're near a shrine. You'll need to look around. to find it. I just glanced at the navigation,. Oh, got it. there it is - a Sound Memory. Then, you can listen to Zelda's messages. on your phone. So, if you play through the game again,. you'll still get to experience some new story elements. Now, let's move on to the next feature:. Guided Navigation. It's basically the Hyrule version of Gaode Maps. You can first select a destination here. For instance, if you can't find a Korok seed,. you can click on "Hidden Korok Seeds," and all of them will be displayed on the map,. densely packed. Or, if I feel like using a Gachapon machine today. but can't remember where they are,. I can also open this up. Let's say I want to go to this location. I can start the navigation. (Navigation starts: "Proceed southwest from here."). The distance is quite far. The voiceover is purely AI-generated. And the navigation is quite detailed.

For example,. if a shrine is super well-hidden,. it'll even mark the entrance and exit. (Seems like it's not far now.). (Nearby). Here it is. (Seems like I've found it.). The next feature is. the Daily Luck Test. You can draw an item here every day. Let's give it a try today. and see what dish we can get. Oh, I drew a Hard-Boiled Dish. Then, we can use it in the game. Now, our defense will be boosted for 5 minutes. The most useful feature is the Blueprint Upload. In the blueprint history,. we can send our own blueprints to our phones. Hey,. it's already here. It generates an image. with a QR code. This is incredibly useful for later stages. Honestly, the MKII I'm using now. still veers off course when I fly it. Is there anyone who can send me. a perfect MKII blueprint? The Item Chest feature. allows you to store items in the game,. and then you can give those items to your friends. I'm curious, though. Can I send items from another save file. to myself in this current save? Wouldn't that mean I'd have an infinite supply of items? In general,. if you ask me whether the Switch 2 is worth buying right now,. it's like asking me. if "Monster Hunter Wilds" is worth buying at this moment. It's a great product,. but there's just not enough content at launch. The only exclusive game at launch is Mario Kart. and I don't know if any of you think. this black color... ugh,. it's really unappealing. Where's my beloved toy-like aesthetic? Among all the PC handhelds out there,. it just blends in and doesn't stand out. Can kids really fall in love with something so bulky and drab-looking? Right now, the Switch with extended battery life and the OLED version only cost $118 and $180 respectively. My advice is,. if you haven't bought it yet and are still on the fence,. you could wait for the first blockbuster title on the Switch 2. You could also wait and see if there are any good-looking Joy-Con controllers or limited-edition consoles released later. And, of course, wait for a price drop. Oh, I almost forgot,. the screen is a bit underwhelming too. Maybe you could wait for an OLED version as well. If you're a hardcore gamer. who wants to play every new game on every platform right at launch,. then buying it now doesn't come with much of a premium,. and it's worth collecting. But don't set your expectations too high for the games just yet. Let's hope Nintendo can still come up with impressive titles in the future,. like "The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild" or "Animal Crossing: New Horizons," that leave a lasting impression~. Ok. So all for this video. If you find this video helpful. Remember to hit that one-click Like, Subscribe & Bell Notification for me! This is very important to me. Then I'm Cherry.

See you next time. Bye ~.

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9VKkI09qWYw

今天這期影片就來跟大家說說，Switch2遊戲表現到底是什麼水平，馬車世界好不好玩，說明書竟然比想像中的有意思？ 多加的這個C鍵是幹嘛用的？充電續航如何？一個影片完整了解Switch2 各種設計和遊戲體驗！

#數碼 #開箱 #switch2 #nintendoswitch
item.description:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 深入了解任天堂 Switch 2 的設計巧思與內部構造，包括 Joy-Con 連接的巧妙設計。
  • 搶先一窺預載遊戲「Nintendo Switch 2 歡迎之旅」的內容與趣味之處，了解其如何展示新主機特色。
  • 掌握全新遊戲「瑪利歐賽車世界」的核心玩法，包括獨特的大世界探索模式與多人排位賽的體驗分享。
  • 了解 Switch 2 新增的語音聊天與螢幕分享功能，以及作者實際使用時遇到的設定與應用情境。

摘要

開箱趣聞與影片概述

故事從作者拿到 Switch 2 的趣事開始。他在趕製介紹影片時，不慎將附贈的瑪利歐賽車兌換碼曝光在影片中， رغم已經發現並嘗試挽救，但碼在短短十分鐘內就被他人領取，造成了損失。作者檢視了當天的拍攝畫面，證實了兌換碼確實曾出現在鏡頭裡，並自嘲是因為急著體驗實體卡帶遊戲，而完全忘記了數位兌換碼的存在。

本次影片主要聚焦在 Switch 2 的遊戲效能表現、「瑪利歐賽車」的樂趣、「Nintendo Switch 2 歡迎之旅」是否比想像中更有趣、新增 C 按鈕的用途，以及電池續航力等關鍵問題。作者表示，希望透過這支影片，讓觀眾能夠完整了解 Switch 2 的設計與遊戲體驗。

深入探索 Switch 2 的設計細節

作者首先分享了遊玩「Nintendo Switch 2 歡迎之旅」的感受，這款遊戲出乎他意料的有趣，讓他不知不覺玩了十多個小時。不過，他認為這款遊戲更像是任天堂寫給自己的「情書」，大部分內容都在展示 Switch 2 設計的精妙之處，對於只想單純玩遊戲的玩家而言，或許觀看影片了解即可。

遊戲中詳細解釋了 Switch 2 的許多設計細節，例如主機與 Joy-Con 連接處的巨大縫隙，這並非設計失誤，而是為了防止 Joy-Con 因槓桿原理在受力時意外脫落的重要間隙。由於沒有縫隙來產生扭動，Joy-Con 會變得非常難以拔出。

此外，Joy-Con 上的 SL 和 SR 按鈕下方其實只有兩片簡單的鐵片，是靠主機上的磁鐵吸附來固定。當磁鐵吸附時，按鈕會稍微向外突出。由於按鈕本身就設計成可移動的，這使得握持 Joy-Con 時會感到有些許晃動，是個有趣的设计。

作者也曾擔心過 Joy-Con 與主機連接針腳容易斷裂的問題，但 Nintendo 在設計時考慮到了這一點。遊戲中的動畫演示了連接器部分的巧妙結構：中间的連接部分設計得非常鬆散，即使 Joy-Con 發生扭轉，中間連接部分也不會隨之移動，內外都留有間隙，即使大力扭動也不容易折斷。有人實際嘗試過，确实非常堅固。

遊戲還介紹了 Joy-Con 上的光學感應器（被作者稱為滑鼠感應器），並指出佩戴腕帶和不佩戴時的對焦距離不同，因此特別客製化了鏡頭以確保準確對焦。通過近距離觀察，可以看到感應器內部有一個肉眼不可見、不斷閃爍的紅點。

電源與充電考量

提到充電，作者發現 Switch 2 不支援快速充電，並對此感到困惑。任天堂官方解釋這是為了延長電池壽命，例如充電時盡量不要充滿，並且快充更容易損壞電池，所以設計上不支援快充。作者對此理由表示質疑，畢竟這台大尺寸的遊戲機充電功率僅與 iPhone 8 相當，使用 60 瓦充電器也只能跑到 15 瓦，這種设计令人難以評價。

Welcome Tour 的趣味迷你遊戲與設計巧思

「Nintendo Switch 2 歡迎之旅」遊戲本身相當有趣，內含許多迷你遊戲，甚至可以邀請朋友一起挑戰。例如其中的幀率測試挑戰，專門設計給聲稱能區分 120 幀和 60 幀的玩家，讓他們測試能否一次全對。

遊戲透過不同區域從外到內展示 Switch 2 的結構。例如，它會告訴玩家為了讓肩部按鈕從任何角度都能按壓到，設計中增加了兩個彈簧。遊戲中甚至有個可愛的小人站在 Joy-Con 展示區裡，說著「是真的，這裡也有彈簧」。

另一個例子是進入 B 區時，遊戲會提醒該區域地面非常濕滑，跑太快可能會「咚」的一聲摔倒，這些细节增加了遊戲的趣味性。

遊戲中還有一個非常有趣的相機遊戲，內容是模仿表情。作者實際體驗後感到非常爆笑，並發現了利用露出眉毛來幫助辨識的技巧。遊戲需要辨識玩家的表情，並根據相似度給予評分。作者嘗試挑戰高難度表情，並分享了獲得高分和挑戰失敗的過程，展現了遊戲相機功能的趣味互動。

全新語音聊天與螢幕分享功能

本次 Switch 2 主打的一項新功能是語音聊天。透過新增的 C 按鈕，玩家可以與朋友分享自己的遊戲畫面。如果連接了攝像頭，甚至可以将自己的影像疊加到遊戲畫面上，看起來就像在開視訊會議。

然而，使用聊天功能有一個限制，必須綁定非中國大陸的手機號碼。作者嘗試綁定香港手機卡未果，最終請加拿大朋友代為綁定。初次開啟聊天功能時，需要選擇允許哪些朋友發起聊天。建立房間後，只有相互允許的朋友才能加入語音聊天。

在設定中，玩家可以選擇開啟或關閉攝像頭，並有多種螢幕佈局預設可選，除了直接的人物影像剪裁，還可以選擇氣泡窗口等樣式。

作者認為，雖然可能有人會質疑玩遊戲時是否真的會開鏡頭，但對於情侶一起玩遊戲或是玩 Splatoon 等合作對戰遊戲時，語音聊天和螢幕分享功能會非常實用。例如在 Splatoon 中，即使自己被擊倒，也能通過隊友的畫面了解敵人位置，實現「光明正大」的偷看螢幕，而無需語音報點。聊天功能也支援語音轉文字，但目前不支援中文。

旗艦遊戲：瑪利歐賽車世界

最後，作者談到了 Switch 2 唯一的首發旗艦遊戲「瑪利歐賽車世界」。他直接给出了結論：非常好玩。這兩天工作室的同事都無心工作，轮流在客廳裡激烈遊玩。

本次的「瑪利歐賽車世界」分為排位賽和大世界探索兩個部分。作者對大家更好奇的大世界探索進行了详细介紹。雖然遊戲確實為瑪利歐賽車創建了一個完整的大地圖，但它的「大世界」並不像薩爾達那樣無縫开放，更像是將以往的各種地圖做成了獨立的「箱庭世界」，再通過道路或航線連接起來。

有趣的是，本作瑪利歐賽車地圖的縱深感明顯增強，不僅可以在空中飛行或潛入水下，每個主题的「城市面貌」也都經過精心設計。在大世界中駕駛時，遠處的城市看起來就像巨大的遊樂園，極具吸引力。大世界中還散佈著一些迷你遊戲，例如開卡車亂撞、駕駛 UFO 吸牛等。玩家還可以在路邊便利店獲取特殊道具，第一次獲得時可以解鎖角色的新服裝。

至於排位賽，作者認為瑪利歐賽車與真人對戰時樂趣更甚，尤其是 24 人參與的「大獎賽模式」。

================================================

I've already got my hands on the Switch2 and have been playing it for a few days. A couple of days ago, we made an incredibly detailed video for you. That day, my editor and I worked through the night until eight in the morning. The video was uploaded just as I was about to go to bed. Then I saw a comment saying that the Mario Kart redemption code was visible. I quickly asked my buddy to salvage the situation. But in just 10 minutes,. it was already too late. I lost the Mario Kart code directly. I was also at fault for being eager to play the game. and using the physical cartridge,. completely forgetting about the redemption code. I even went back to check the footage from that day. Let me show you. The digital activation code for Mario. I'm not showing you that. Haha. I'm not showing you that. Take this away. So that we don't have to edit it out later. Don't lose it. Although we can find it in our video footage. Indeed, you really can find it in our video footage. Today's video is going to talk about. just how good the Switch2's gaming performance is. Is Mario Kart fun? Is Nintendo Switch 2 Welcome Tour actually more interesting than we thought? What's the purpose of the added C button? How's the battery life? Get a complete understanding of the Switch2's design and gaming experience in one video. Nintendo Switch 2 Welcome Tour, this game is actually more interesting than I imagined. I have been playing for more than ten hours without even realizing it. But I feel that this game is like a love letter Nintendo wrote to itself. Most of the content is like:. Come and have a look, everyone! The Switch I designed is just amazing. If you just want to buy it for fun, then don't bother. Just watch my video. For example, here. I was also puzzled when I first got it. Why is there such a big gap here? But. there's an official explanation for this. Take a close look. at the connection between the Nintendo Switch 2 console and the Joy-Con. This gap is actually very important. Why is that? Because this gap. makes it very difficult to remove the Joy-Con. Without this gap for it to twist,. the Joy-Con could easily be pulled off. due to the lever principle. And the magnets on the Joy-Con,. they're actually only on the console. The magnets on the console. hold onto these SL and SR buttons. These buttons. are actually just two simple pieces of iron. And when they're pulled up by the magnets,. the buttons will slightly move outward. And because they're buttons,. buttons are meant to move. So when holding the Joy-Con,. there's a bit of wiggle room. This design is quite interesting. And there's something I've always been worried about,. the issue of the connection pins when holding it. Nintendo's design has actually taken that into account. There's a very intuitive animation in the game. that shows us. how this connector part works.

This cyan part here,. it's actually very loosely held together like this. So when it twists,. the part that's connected in the middle. doesn't move with it. It's like they've left some clearance both inside and outside. Even if you apply a lot of force,. it won't easily break. And there's actually someone who's tried it,. and it really can't be broken. This part of the Joy-Con is the mouse sensor. And it says here,. when you're wearing the wrist strap and when you're not,. the focusing distance is different. So,. in order to make the camera focus properly,. they customized this lens. This part of the Joy-Con is its mouse sensor. And if we take a closer look,. you'll see a red dot inside. that keeps flashing,. which is invisible to the naked eye. And another funny thing is,. Nintendo says they don't support fast charging,. because it's to extend the battery life. For example, when charging,. try not to let it charge too full. And fast charging can damage the battery more easily. So we design it to not support fast charging. Is this the reason why your 60-watt charger. can only use 15 watts? For such a big gaming console,. the charging power. is on par with the iPhone 8. It's really hard to judge. Really. I think the entire game is quite fun. And there are so many mini-games inside. You can even invite friends to come and challenge together. For example, this frame rate test challenge. People who always say. they can tell the difference between 120 frames and 60 frames. should hurry up and give it a try. See if you can get them all right in one go. The game uses different zones. to showcase the structure of the Switch 2 from the outside in. For example,. it tells you here. that in order for the shoulder buttons to be pressed from every angle,. they added two springs. So here's a particularly cute detail. Inside the Joy-Con's exhibit area, there's a little man. He stands here and says,. "Really." "There is a spring here, too." For another example,. as soon as you enter Zone B,. he will remind you. that the ground in this area is very slippery. If you run too fast,. you might. "thump" and take a tumble. Next to the 4K TV experience zone,. some people are debating whether to buy a 4K TV. Maybe discuss it after getting home. In summary,. if you're interested in the design of the Switch itself,. you can give it a try. This time, Nintendo has a feature. that they're heavily promoting for the Switch2.

Voice chat. Through this C button, you can share your screen with your friends. It will share your gameplay to your friends' screens. If you have a camera,. you can even superimpose your face on it. It looks just like you are having a meeting. However,. to use the Chat function,. you must bind a non-mainland phone card. But,. for some reason, my Hong Kong phone card couldn't be bound. In the end, I had my friend in Canada bind it for me. When you first open the Chat function,. it will ask you to choose which friends you allow to chat with. After setting up a room,. only friends who have mutually allowed each other can join the voice chat. In the settings,. you can turn your camera on or off. There are also several presets for the screen layout. Besides the direct cutout for the camera figure,. you can also choose a bubble window. But have you ever thought about. when you play games with your friends,. would you really turn on the camera? It can even convert voice to text,. although it doesn't support Chinese yet. Actually, when I play games,. I really love playing with friends. Even if we're playing different games,. each doing our own thing,. it's still fun to chat together. If it's a couple playing games together,. this would be perfect. For example, if you're playing a cooperative PVP game like Splatoon,. it would be more interesting to see your teammate's perspective. When you're down, you can still watch your teammate attack the enermy. Just by watching your teammate's screen, you'll know where the enemies are. And there's no need to call out positions. Just legitimately peek the screen. There's also a very interesting camera game in Nintendo Switch 2 Welcome Tour. It's about imitating facial expressions. It really cracked me up. This camera,. there's a little flap here to cover it. Once it's turned on,. the camera light will come on. And I've tried it,. if I zoom like this,. it will track my face. Look! I found a trick. Because it needs to recognize your eyebrows,. you can expose your eyebrows. What kind of expression is this? Like this. A little higher. This angle. is too difficult. The eyebrows are not good enough. Still not enough. Ah. This one is good. I can do this. I have to look over here with my eyes. Oh, the angle's a bit high. Wow,. but they're all 20 points. 93 points totally! Amazing. Let's see the next one. This expression is just too wise. Hahaha. Wow, I'm so awesome.

Only lost 2 points. How can the eyebrows fly like that? They can actually fly out of the face. I feel like I'm going to cramp. My eyebrows can't fly out. The last one. The high-difficulty move, wink. Very close. Very close. Let's see if I can get three stars. Didn't get three stars. It's okay. I got it before. Haha. Let's talk about the only flagship game for this Switch2,. Mario Kart World. Let's come to the conclusion first. It's really fun. These past two days, my colleagues at the studio have no heart for work,. taking turns to play fiercely in the living room. This time, Mario Kart World is actually divided into two parts:. ranking races and big world exploration. Let's first talk about the big world exploration that everyone's more curious about. This time, Nintendo has indeed created a whole big map for Mario Kart World. But its big world is not like the kind in Zelda. It's more like various maps from before have been turned into separate box worlds. And these box worlds are connected through various roads and sea routes. What's interesting is,. I think the sense of depth in the Mario Kart maps is much stronger in this installment. And it's not just about flying in the sky and diving underground. The "city appearance" of each theme has also been carefully designed. When driving in the big world,. these cities look like huge amusement parks from afar,. super attractive. There are also some mini-games in the big world. For example, you can drive a truck around and crash into things. Life, can you just let me off the hook this once? Next life, I just want to be. a child that never grows up. someone who has people to keep warm with and rely on,. with not too many worries weighing on my mind. With the most innocent eraser,. I could just wipe away all the life's arguments. Life, can you just let me off the hook this once? Sometimes, I'm so tired,. yet I don't even know why I keep going. In Mario Kart, you can even drive a UFO and suck up all the cows. There's another cool thing about the big open world. you can grab a special item from a roadside convenience store. The first time you get it, you'll unlock a costume for your character. Now, let's talk about ranked races. Honestly,. Mario Kart is way more fun when you're playing with real people. Especially this Grand Prix mode,. where 24 players race together. The competition is seriously intense. That's how it was for me. I'd often be in the lead,. and then all of a sudden, I'd get bombarded with turtles, bombs, and lightning bolts,. and drop way down to like 10th place or beyond. By the way, here are some tips for new players. At the start of the race, it might be a good idea to hang back a bit. The random items you get in this game are based on your ranking. The lower your rank,. the more powerful items you can get. And focus on collecting as many coins as you can. Each coin gives you a 1% speed boost,. and you can stack up to 20 of them. Then, in the second half of the race, you can unleash a burst of speed. As for performance,. Nintendo players are finally getting a treat. In single-player mode,.

the big open world and ranked races run smoothly at 4K 60 frames per second. Even in high-load scenes, there's no frame drops. In two-player split-screen, the frame rate drops. a bit to around 50 FPS. And in four-player split-screen,. it drops even further to 30 FPS,. and the resolution also takes a hit. But for a party game,. the overall experience is still pretty good. Cyberpunk 2077 is a game I've been really looking forward to this time around. First off, it's absolutely crazy that. a 3A game like Cyberpunk 2077 can even run on the Switch. It's a great indicator of how future. third-party games might perform when ported to the Switch 2. There are also big titles like Elden Ring,. Red Dead Redemption 2. and I'm really worried about whether the Final Fantasy will run smoothly. When you actually put the Switch 2 in handheld mode next to two other mainstream handhelds,. in its performance mode, the native resolution is roughly around 540P - 480P. With DLSS, the output resolution is 720P,. aiming for a 40 FPS target. But in large-scale, high-load scenarios, it might drop to 30 - 35 FPS. The ROG Ally, on the other hand, just crushes it. with 1080P resolution,. leading the other two machines in both frame rate and graphical fidelity. Comparing the Switch 2 to the Steam Deck OLED,. since they use different textures,. they each have their strengths and weaknesses in terms of actual in-game graphics. The claimed tenfold performance boost of the Switch 2. includes Nvidia's DLSS upscaling algorithm. Nvidia's DLSS does indeed have fewer bugs compared to AMD's FSR. The Steam Deck OLED tends to have more. jaggies and aliasing in mobile scenarios. But. here's the thing to note:. the Switch 2's screen is nowhere near the same league as an OLED. It looks kind of dull and the image isn't as sharp as the Steam Deck's,. especially noticeable in certain areas. If you just look at the screen performance of these gaming devices,. the Switch 2 falls far short of the Steam Deck's screen in terms of comfort. There's even a big gap between it and the ROG Ally X, which also has an LCD screen. Foreign bloggers have tested and found that the Switch 2's peak brightness is only 400 - 450 nits,. and its HDR is just HDR10,. not what we'd consider true HDR. HDR1000. It is more like an entry-level HDR device. In TV mode, we compare it to other game consoles. In quality modes,. it actually outputs at 1080P. Compared to the PS5, there's a huge gap in both lighting effects and details. However, when compared to the XSS,. which outputs at 1440P,. the Switch 2 has better texture quality. and higher contrast,. with more noticeable lighting layers. You could say they're very close,. with each having its own advantages. In the Switch 2's quality mode,. it only supports partial ray tracing. Its load speeds are just about okay. Among consoles with SSDs, it's indeed on the slower side,. but it's way faster than the old-school HDD-equipped PS4. Now, let's talk about the actual gameplay experience:. The default version of the game doesn't support Chinese voiceovers. You'll need to download them from the Eshop. Just search for "2077" in the Eshop,. and you'll see all the language versions available. as free DLCs for download. By default, the Joy-Con mouse function isn't enabled in the game. We need to turn it on in the settings. The default sensitivity is set to 5,.

and even as a high-sensitivity FPS player, I found it way too fast. But you can adjust it to your liking. I set it to 2,. and let's give this gun recoil control a try. Hey, it works pretty well! While you can adjust the sensitivity for the guns,. the menus are super fast. I also tried tweaking the mouse sensitivity in the external settings. But here's the thing. the mouse sensitivity outside the game. doesn't affect the in-game settings at all. I never imagined a handheld console could be operated like this. Overall, I'm quite satisfied with the gaming experience. Even though I'm comparing it to other handhelds,. the Switch 2 is still way lighter and thinner than them. We've already tested the Switch 2's charging in a previous video. Whether you use a 100W charger or the original one,. it only charges at 15W via PD. It takes over two hours to fully charge. Battery life is also a big concern for everyone. When testing a brand-new machine running "The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom" on the Switch 2,. the battery lasted 3 hours and 45 minutes. For a high-load game like Cyberpunk 2077, running from 100% to empty,. it lasted 2 hours and 30 minutes. If we consider a 15% battery degradation after two years of use,. it might end up being around 3 hours for medium-load games. and 2 hours for heavy-load ones. It's just barely enough,. quite on the edge. There's one thing about the Switch 2 that I'm really excited about. I can finally play Zelda at a high frame rate! If you have an old save file that you're in the middle of,. you can transfer the entire data to the Switch 2. Nintendo knows that. just upgrading the graphics package isn't enough. So, they've come up with something new. the Zelda Notes app that links your phone with the Switch. First off, this Zelda Notes feature is only available in the "Tears of the Kingdom" Switch 2 version. And by default, it's turned off in the game. We need to enable it in the settings. and choose to use the Zelda Notes. One of the features is the Sound Memories,. which is kind of like the new Dragon's Tears. For example, when you're exploring the map,. it'll play a sound similar to when you're near a shrine. You'll need to look around. to find it. I just glanced at the navigation,. Oh, got it. there it is - a Sound Memory. Then, you can listen to Zelda's messages. on your phone. So, if you play through the game again,. you'll still get to experience some new story elements. Now, let's move on to the next feature:. Guided Navigation. It's basically the Hyrule version of Gaode Maps. You can first select a destination here. For instance, if you can't find a Korok seed,. you can click on "Hidden Korok Seeds," and all of them will be displayed on the map,. densely packed. Or, if I feel like using a Gachapon machine today. but can't remember where they are,. I can also open this up. Let's say I want to go to this location. I can start the navigation. (Navigation starts: "Proceed southwest from here."). The distance is quite far. The voiceover is purely AI-generated. And the navigation is quite detailed.

For example,. if a shrine is super well-hidden,. it'll even mark the entrance and exit. (Seems like it's not far now.). (Nearby). Here it is. (Seems like I've found it.). The next feature is. the Daily Luck Test. You can draw an item here every day. Let's give it a try today. and see what dish we can get. Oh, I drew a Hard-Boiled Dish. Then, we can use it in the game. Now, our defense will be boosted for 5 minutes. The most useful feature is the Blueprint Upload. In the blueprint history,. we can send our own blueprints to our phones. Hey,. it's already here. It generates an image. with a QR code. This is incredibly useful for later stages. Honestly, the MKII I'm using now. still veers off course when I fly it. Is there anyone who can send me. a perfect MKII blueprint? The Item Chest feature. allows you to store items in the game,. and then you can give those items to your friends. I'm curious, though. Can I send items from another save file. to myself in this current save? Wouldn't that mean I'd have an infinite supply of items? In general,. if you ask me whether the Switch 2 is worth buying right now,. it's like asking me. if "Monster Hunter Wilds" is worth buying at this moment. It's a great product,. but there's just not enough content at launch. The only exclusive game at launch is Mario Kart. and I don't know if any of you think. this black color... ugh,. it's really unappealing. Where's my beloved toy-like aesthetic? Among all the PC handhelds out there,. it just blends in and doesn't stand out. Can kids really fall in love with something so bulky and drab-looking? Right now, the Switch with extended battery life and the OLED version only cost $118 and $180 respectively. My advice is,. if you haven't bought it yet and are still on the fence,. you could wait for the first blockbuster title on the Switch 2. You could also wait and see if there are any good-looking Joy-Con controllers or limited-edition consoles released later. And, of course, wait for a price drop. Oh, I almost forgot,. the screen is a bit underwhelming too. Maybe you could wait for an OLED version as well. If you're a hardcore gamer. who wants to play every new game on every platform right at launch,. then buying it now doesn't come with much of a premium,. and it's worth collecting. But don't set your expectations too high for the games just yet. Let's hope Nintendo can still come up with impressive titles in the future,. like "The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild" or "Animal Crossing: New Horizons," that leave a lasting impression~. Ok. So all for this video. If you find this video helpful. Remember to hit that one-click Like, Subscribe & Bell Notification for me! This is very important to me. Then I'm Cherry.

See you next time. Bye ~.

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9VKkI09qWYw

歡迎訂閱切狸~ 在這裡你會看到很多有趣的數碼資訊哦！ | Please don’t forget to subscribe 💋：https://bit.ly/3jQ3429

今天這期影片就來跟大家說說，Switch2遊戲表現到底是什麼水平，馬車世界好不好玩，說明書竟然比想像中的有意思？ 多加的這個C鍵是幹嘛用的？充電續航如何？一個影片完整了解Switch2 各種設計和遊戲體驗！

上一期有非常詳細的開箱體驗哦:https://youtu.be/TviKk8TVHUw

#數碼 #開箱 #switch2 #nintendoswitch
item.content:encoded:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 深入了解任天堂 Switch 2 的設計巧思與內部構造，包括 Joy-Con 連接的巧妙設計。
  • 搶先一窺預載遊戲「Nintendo Switch 2 歡迎之旅」的內容與趣味之處，了解其如何展示新主機特色。
  • 掌握全新遊戲「瑪利歐賽車世界」的核心玩法，包括獨特的大世界探索模式與多人排位賽的體驗分享。
  • 了解 Switch 2 新增的語音聊天與螢幕分享功能，以及作者實際使用時遇到的設定與應用情境。

摘要

開箱趣聞與影片概述

故事從作者拿到 Switch 2 的趣事開始。他在趕製介紹影片時，不慎將附贈的瑪利歐賽車兌換碼曝光在影片中， رغم已經發現並嘗試挽救，但碼在短短十分鐘內就被他人領取，造成了損失。作者檢視了當天的拍攝畫面，證實了兌換碼確實曾出現在鏡頭裡，並自嘲是因為急著體驗實體卡帶遊戲，而完全忘記了數位兌換碼的存在。

本次影片主要聚焦在 Switch 2 的遊戲效能表現、「瑪利歐賽車」的樂趣、「Nintendo Switch 2 歡迎之旅」是否比想像中更有趣、新增 C 按鈕的用途，以及電池續航力等關鍵問題。作者表示，希望透過這支影片，讓觀眾能夠完整了解 Switch 2 的設計與遊戲體驗。

深入探索 Switch 2 的設計細節

作者首先分享了遊玩「Nintendo Switch 2 歡迎之旅」的感受，這款遊戲出乎他意料的有趣，讓他不知不覺玩了十多個小時。不過，他認為這款遊戲更像是任天堂寫給自己的「情書」，大部分內容都在展示 Switch 2 設計的精妙之處，對於只想單純玩遊戲的玩家而言，或許觀看影片了解即可。

遊戲中詳細解釋了 Switch 2 的許多設計細節，例如主機與 Joy-Con 連接處的巨大縫隙，這並非設計失誤，而是為了防止 Joy-Con 因槓桿原理在受力時意外脫落的重要間隙。由於沒有縫隙來產生扭動，Joy-Con 會變得非常難以拔出。

此外，Joy-Con 上的 SL 和 SR 按鈕下方其實只有兩片簡單的鐵片，是靠主機上的磁鐵吸附來固定。當磁鐵吸附時，按鈕會稍微向外突出。由於按鈕本身就設計成可移動的，這使得握持 Joy-Con 時會感到有些許晃動，是個有趣的设计。

作者也曾擔心過 Joy-Con 與主機連接針腳容易斷裂的問題，但 Nintendo 在設計時考慮到了這一點。遊戲中的動畫演示了連接器部分的巧妙結構：中间的連接部分設計得非常鬆散，即使 Joy-Con 發生扭轉，中間連接部分也不會隨之移動，內外都留有間隙，即使大力扭動也不容易折斷。有人實際嘗試過，确实非常堅固。

遊戲還介紹了 Joy-Con 上的光學感應器（被作者稱為滑鼠感應器），並指出佩戴腕帶和不佩戴時的對焦距離不同，因此特別客製化了鏡頭以確保準確對焦。通過近距離觀察，可以看到感應器內部有一個肉眼不可見、不斷閃爍的紅點。

電源與充電考量

提到充電，作者發現 Switch 2 不支援快速充電，並對此感到困惑。任天堂官方解釋這是為了延長電池壽命，例如充電時盡量不要充滿，並且快充更容易損壞電池，所以設計上不支援快充。作者對此理由表示質疑，畢竟這台大尺寸的遊戲機充電功率僅與 iPhone 8 相當，使用 60 瓦充電器也只能跑到 15 瓦，這種设计令人難以評價。

Welcome Tour 的趣味迷你遊戲與設計巧思

「Nintendo Switch 2 歡迎之旅」遊戲本身相當有趣，內含許多迷你遊戲，甚至可以邀請朋友一起挑戰。例如其中的幀率測試挑戰，專門設計給聲稱能區分 120 幀和 60 幀的玩家，讓他們測試能否一次全對。

遊戲透過不同區域從外到內展示 Switch 2 的結構。例如，它會告訴玩家為了讓肩部按鈕從任何角度都能按壓到，設計中增加了兩個彈簧。遊戲中甚至有個可愛的小人站在 Joy-Con 展示區裡，說著「是真的，這裡也有彈簧」。

另一個例子是進入 B 區時，遊戲會提醒該區域地面非常濕滑，跑太快可能會「咚」的一聲摔倒，這些细节增加了遊戲的趣味性。

遊戲中還有一個非常有趣的相機遊戲，內容是模仿表情。作者實際體驗後感到非常爆笑，並發現了利用露出眉毛來幫助辨識的技巧。遊戲需要辨識玩家的表情，並根據相似度給予評分。作者嘗試挑戰高難度表情，並分享了獲得高分和挑戰失敗的過程，展現了遊戲相機功能的趣味互動。

全新語音聊天與螢幕分享功能

本次 Switch 2 主打的一項新功能是語音聊天。透過新增的 C 按鈕，玩家可以與朋友分享自己的遊戲畫面。如果連接了攝像頭，甚至可以将自己的影像疊加到遊戲畫面上，看起來就像在開視訊會議。

然而，使用聊天功能有一個限制，必須綁定非中國大陸的手機號碼。作者嘗試綁定香港手機卡未果，最終請加拿大朋友代為綁定。初次開啟聊天功能時，需要選擇允許哪些朋友發起聊天。建立房間後，只有相互允許的朋友才能加入語音聊天。

在設定中，玩家可以選擇開啟或關閉攝像頭，並有多種螢幕佈局預設可選，除了直接的人物影像剪裁，還可以選擇氣泡窗口等樣式。

作者認為，雖然可能有人會質疑玩遊戲時是否真的會開鏡頭，但對於情侶一起玩遊戲或是玩 Splatoon 等合作對戰遊戲時，語音聊天和螢幕分享功能會非常實用。例如在 Splatoon 中，即使自己被擊倒，也能通過隊友的畫面了解敵人位置，實現「光明正大」的偷看螢幕，而無需語音報點。聊天功能也支援語音轉文字，但目前不支援中文。

旗艦遊戲：瑪利歐賽車世界

最後，作者談到了 Switch 2 唯一的首發旗艦遊戲「瑪利歐賽車世界」。他直接给出了結論：非常好玩。這兩天工作室的同事都無心工作，轮流在客廳裡激烈遊玩。

本次的「瑪利歐賽車世界」分為排位賽和大世界探索兩個部分。作者對大家更好奇的大世界探索進行了详细介紹。雖然遊戲確實為瑪利歐賽車創建了一個完整的大地圖，但它的「大世界」並不像薩爾達那樣無縫开放，更像是將以往的各種地圖做成了獨立的「箱庭世界」，再通過道路或航線連接起來。

有趣的是，本作瑪利歐賽車地圖的縱深感明顯增強，不僅可以在空中飛行或潛入水下，每個主题的「城市面貌」也都經過精心設計。在大世界中駕駛時，遠處的城市看起來就像巨大的遊樂園，極具吸引力。大世界中還散佈著一些迷你遊戲，例如開卡車亂撞、駕駛 UFO 吸牛等。玩家還可以在路邊便利店獲取特殊道具，第一次獲得時可以解鎖角色的新服裝。

至於排位賽，作者認為瑪利歐賽車與真人對戰時樂趣更甚，尤其是 24 人參與的「大獎賽模式」。

================================================

I've already got my hands on the Switch2 and have been playing it for a few days. A couple of days ago, we made an incredibly detailed video for you. That day, my editor and I worked through the night until eight in the morning. The video was uploaded just as I was about to go to bed. Then I saw a comment saying that the Mario Kart redemption code was visible. I quickly asked my buddy to salvage the situation. But in just 10 minutes,. it was already too late. I lost the Mario Kart code directly. I was also at fault for being eager to play the game. and using the physical cartridge,. completely forgetting about the redemption code. I even went back to check the footage from that day. Let me show you. The digital activation code for Mario. I'm not showing you that. Haha. I'm not showing you that. Take this away. So that we don't have to edit it out later. Don't lose it. Although we can find it in our video footage. Indeed, you really can find it in our video footage. Today's video is going to talk about. just how good the Switch2's gaming performance is. Is Mario Kart fun? Is Nintendo Switch 2 Welcome Tour actually more interesting than we thought? What's the purpose of the added C button? How's the battery life? Get a complete understanding of the Switch2's design and gaming experience in one video. Nintendo Switch 2 Welcome Tour, this game is actually more interesting than I imagined. I have been playing for more than ten hours without even realizing it. But I feel that this game is like a love letter Nintendo wrote to itself. Most of the content is like:. Come and have a look, everyone! The Switch I designed is just amazing. If you just want to buy it for fun, then don't bother. Just watch my video. For example, here. I was also puzzled when I first got it. Why is there such a big gap here? But. there's an official explanation for this. Take a close look. at the connection between the Nintendo Switch 2 console and the Joy-Con. This gap is actually very important. Why is that? Because this gap. makes it very difficult to remove the Joy-Con. Without this gap for it to twist,. the Joy-Con could easily be pulled off. due to the lever principle. And the magnets on the Joy-Con,. they're actually only on the console. The magnets on the console. hold onto these SL and SR buttons. These buttons. are actually just two simple pieces of iron. And when they're pulled up by the magnets,. the buttons will slightly move outward. And because they're buttons,. buttons are meant to move. So when holding the Joy-Con,. there's a bit of wiggle room. This design is quite interesting. And there's something I've always been worried about,. the issue of the connection pins when holding it. Nintendo's design has actually taken that into account. There's a very intuitive animation in the game. that shows us. how this connector part works.

This cyan part here,. it's actually very loosely held together like this. So when it twists,. the part that's connected in the middle. doesn't move with it. It's like they've left some clearance both inside and outside. Even if you apply a lot of force,. it won't easily break. And there's actually someone who's tried it,. and it really can't be broken. This part of the Joy-Con is the mouse sensor. And it says here,. when you're wearing the wrist strap and when you're not,. the focusing distance is different. So,. in order to make the camera focus properly,. they customized this lens. This part of the Joy-Con is its mouse sensor. And if we take a closer look,. you'll see a red dot inside. that keeps flashing,. which is invisible to the naked eye. And another funny thing is,. Nintendo says they don't support fast charging,. because it's to extend the battery life. For example, when charging,. try not to let it charge too full. And fast charging can damage the battery more easily. So we design it to not support fast charging. Is this the reason why your 60-watt charger. can only use 15 watts? For such a big gaming console,. the charging power. is on par with the iPhone 8. It's really hard to judge. Really. I think the entire game is quite fun. And there are so many mini-games inside. You can even invite friends to come and challenge together. For example, this frame rate test challenge. People who always say. they can tell the difference between 120 frames and 60 frames. should hurry up and give it a try. See if you can get them all right in one go. The game uses different zones. to showcase the structure of the Switch 2 from the outside in. For example,. it tells you here. that in order for the shoulder buttons to be pressed from every angle,. they added two springs. So here's a particularly cute detail. Inside the Joy-Con's exhibit area, there's a little man. He stands here and says,. "Really." "There is a spring here, too." For another example,. as soon as you enter Zone B,. he will remind you. that the ground in this area is very slippery. If you run too fast,. you might. "thump" and take a tumble. Next to the 4K TV experience zone,. some people are debating whether to buy a 4K TV. Maybe discuss it after getting home. In summary,. if you're interested in the design of the Switch itself,. you can give it a try. This time, Nintendo has a feature. that they're heavily promoting for the Switch2.

Voice chat. Through this C button, you can share your screen with your friends. It will share your gameplay to your friends' screens. If you have a camera,. you can even superimpose your face on it. It looks just like you are having a meeting. However,. to use the Chat function,. you must bind a non-mainland phone card. But,. for some reason, my Hong Kong phone card couldn't be bound. In the end, I had my friend in Canada bind it for me. When you first open the Chat function,. it will ask you to choose which friends you allow to chat with. After setting up a room,. only friends who have mutually allowed each other can join the voice chat. In the settings,. you can turn your camera on or off. There are also several presets for the screen layout. Besides the direct cutout for the camera figure,. you can also choose a bubble window. But have you ever thought about. when you play games with your friends,. would you really turn on the camera? It can even convert voice to text,. although it doesn't support Chinese yet. Actually, when I play games,. I really love playing with friends. Even if we're playing different games,. each doing our own thing,. it's still fun to chat together. If it's a couple playing games together,. this would be perfect. For example, if you're playing a cooperative PVP game like Splatoon,. it would be more interesting to see your teammate's perspective. When you're down, you can still watch your teammate attack the enermy. Just by watching your teammate's screen, you'll know where the enemies are. And there's no need to call out positions. Just legitimately peek the screen. There's also a very interesting camera game in Nintendo Switch 2 Welcome Tour. It's about imitating facial expressions. It really cracked me up. This camera,. there's a little flap here to cover it. Once it's turned on,. the camera light will come on. And I've tried it,. if I zoom like this,. it will track my face. Look! I found a trick. Because it needs to recognize your eyebrows,. you can expose your eyebrows. What kind of expression is this? Like this. A little higher. This angle. is too difficult. The eyebrows are not good enough. Still not enough. Ah. This one is good. I can do this. I have to look over here with my eyes. Oh, the angle's a bit high. Wow,. but they're all 20 points. 93 points totally! Amazing. Let's see the next one. This expression is just too wise. Hahaha. Wow, I'm so awesome.

Only lost 2 points. How can the eyebrows fly like that? They can actually fly out of the face. I feel like I'm going to cramp. My eyebrows can't fly out. The last one. The high-difficulty move, wink. Very close. Very close. Let's see if I can get three stars. Didn't get three stars. It's okay. I got it before. Haha. Let's talk about the only flagship game for this Switch2,. Mario Kart World. Let's come to the conclusion first. It's really fun. These past two days, my colleagues at the studio have no heart for work,. taking turns to play fiercely in the living room. This time, Mario Kart World is actually divided into two parts:. ranking races and big world exploration. Let's first talk about the big world exploration that everyone's more curious about. This time, Nintendo has indeed created a whole big map for Mario Kart World. But its big world is not like the kind in Zelda. It's more like various maps from before have been turned into separate box worlds. And these box worlds are connected through various roads and sea routes. What's interesting is,. I think the sense of depth in the Mario Kart maps is much stronger in this installment. And it's not just about flying in the sky and diving underground. The "city appearance" of each theme has also been carefully designed. When driving in the big world,. these cities look like huge amusement parks from afar,. super attractive. There are also some mini-games in the big world. For example, you can drive a truck around and crash into things. Life, can you just let me off the hook this once? Next life, I just want to be. a child that never grows up. someone who has people to keep warm with and rely on,. with not too many worries weighing on my mind. With the most innocent eraser,. I could just wipe away all the life's arguments. Life, can you just let me off the hook this once? Sometimes, I'm so tired,. yet I don't even know why I keep going. In Mario Kart, you can even drive a UFO and suck up all the cows. There's another cool thing about the big open world. you can grab a special item from a roadside convenience store. The first time you get it, you'll unlock a costume for your character. Now, let's talk about ranked races. Honestly,. Mario Kart is way more fun when you're playing with real people. Especially this Grand Prix mode,. where 24 players race together. The competition is seriously intense. That's how it was for me. I'd often be in the lead,. and then all of a sudden, I'd get bombarded with turtles, bombs, and lightning bolts,. and drop way down to like 10th place or beyond. By the way, here are some tips for new players. At the start of the race, it might be a good idea to hang back a bit. The random items you get in this game are based on your ranking. The lower your rank,. the more powerful items you can get. And focus on collecting as many coins as you can. Each coin gives you a 1% speed boost,. and you can stack up to 20 of them. Then, in the second half of the race, you can unleash a burst of speed. As for performance,. Nintendo players are finally getting a treat. In single-player mode,.

the big open world and ranked races run smoothly at 4K 60 frames per second. Even in high-load scenes, there's no frame drops. In two-player split-screen, the frame rate drops. a bit to around 50 FPS. And in four-player split-screen,. it drops even further to 30 FPS,. and the resolution also takes a hit. But for a party game,. the overall experience is still pretty good. Cyberpunk 2077 is a game I've been really looking forward to this time around. First off, it's absolutely crazy that. a 3A game like Cyberpunk 2077 can even run on the Switch. It's a great indicator of how future. third-party games might perform when ported to the Switch 2. There are also big titles like Elden Ring,. Red Dead Redemption 2. and I'm really worried about whether the Final Fantasy will run smoothly. When you actually put the Switch 2 in handheld mode next to two other mainstream handhelds,. in its performance mode, the native resolution is roughly around 540P - 480P. With DLSS, the output resolution is 720P,. aiming for a 40 FPS target. But in large-scale, high-load scenarios, it might drop to 30 - 35 FPS. The ROG Ally, on the other hand, just crushes it. with 1080P resolution,. leading the other two machines in both frame rate and graphical fidelity. Comparing the Switch 2 to the Steam Deck OLED,. since they use different textures,. they each have their strengths and weaknesses in terms of actual in-game graphics. The claimed tenfold performance boost of the Switch 2. includes Nvidia's DLSS upscaling algorithm. Nvidia's DLSS does indeed have fewer bugs compared to AMD's FSR. The Steam Deck OLED tends to have more. jaggies and aliasing in mobile scenarios. But. here's the thing to note:. the Switch 2's screen is nowhere near the same league as an OLED. It looks kind of dull and the image isn't as sharp as the Steam Deck's,. especially noticeable in certain areas. If you just look at the screen performance of these gaming devices,. the Switch 2 falls far short of the Steam Deck's screen in terms of comfort. There's even a big gap between it and the ROG Ally X, which also has an LCD screen. Foreign bloggers have tested and found that the Switch 2's peak brightness is only 400 - 450 nits,. and its HDR is just HDR10,. not what we'd consider true HDR. HDR1000. It is more like an entry-level HDR device. In TV mode, we compare it to other game consoles. In quality modes,. it actually outputs at 1080P. Compared to the PS5, there's a huge gap in both lighting effects and details. However, when compared to the XSS,. which outputs at 1440P,. the Switch 2 has better texture quality. and higher contrast,. with more noticeable lighting layers. You could say they're very close,. with each having its own advantages. In the Switch 2's quality mode,. it only supports partial ray tracing. Its load speeds are just about okay. Among consoles with SSDs, it's indeed on the slower side,. but it's way faster than the old-school HDD-equipped PS4. Now, let's talk about the actual gameplay experience:. The default version of the game doesn't support Chinese voiceovers. You'll need to download them from the Eshop. Just search for "2077" in the Eshop,. and you'll see all the language versions available. as free DLCs for download. By default, the Joy-Con mouse function isn't enabled in the game. We need to turn it on in the settings. The default sensitivity is set to 5,.

and even as a high-sensitivity FPS player, I found it way too fast. But you can adjust it to your liking. I set it to 2,. and let's give this gun recoil control a try. Hey, it works pretty well! While you can adjust the sensitivity for the guns,. the menus are super fast. I also tried tweaking the mouse sensitivity in the external settings. But here's the thing. the mouse sensitivity outside the game. doesn't affect the in-game settings at all. I never imagined a handheld console could be operated like this. Overall, I'm quite satisfied with the gaming experience. Even though I'm comparing it to other handhelds,. the Switch 2 is still way lighter and thinner than them. We've already tested the Switch 2's charging in a previous video. Whether you use a 100W charger or the original one,. it only charges at 15W via PD. It takes over two hours to fully charge. Battery life is also a big concern for everyone. When testing a brand-new machine running "The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom" on the Switch 2,. the battery lasted 3 hours and 45 minutes. For a high-load game like Cyberpunk 2077, running from 100% to empty,. it lasted 2 hours and 30 minutes. If we consider a 15% battery degradation after two years of use,. it might end up being around 3 hours for medium-load games. and 2 hours for heavy-load ones. It's just barely enough,. quite on the edge. There's one thing about the Switch 2 that I'm really excited about. I can finally play Zelda at a high frame rate! If you have an old save file that you're in the middle of,. you can transfer the entire data to the Switch 2. Nintendo knows that. just upgrading the graphics package isn't enough. So, they've come up with something new. the Zelda Notes app that links your phone with the Switch. First off, this Zelda Notes feature is only available in the "Tears of the Kingdom" Switch 2 version. And by default, it's turned off in the game. We need to enable it in the settings. and choose to use the Zelda Notes. One of the features is the Sound Memories,. which is kind of like the new Dragon's Tears. For example, when you're exploring the map,. it'll play a sound similar to when you're near a shrine. You'll need to look around. to find it. I just glanced at the navigation,. Oh, got it. there it is - a Sound Memory. Then, you can listen to Zelda's messages. on your phone. So, if you play through the game again,. you'll still get to experience some new story elements. Now, let's move on to the next feature:. Guided Navigation. It's basically the Hyrule version of Gaode Maps. You can first select a destination here. For instance, if you can't find a Korok seed,. you can click on "Hidden Korok Seeds," and all of them will be displayed on the map,. densely packed. Or, if I feel like using a Gachapon machine today. but can't remember where they are,. I can also open this up. Let's say I want to go to this location. I can start the navigation. (Navigation starts: "Proceed southwest from here."). The distance is quite far. The voiceover is purely AI-generated. And the navigation is quite detailed.

For example,. if a shrine is super well-hidden,. it'll even mark the entrance and exit. (Seems like it's not far now.). (Nearby). Here it is. (Seems like I've found it.). The next feature is. the Daily Luck Test. You can draw an item here every day. Let's give it a try today. and see what dish we can get. Oh, I drew a Hard-Boiled Dish. Then, we can use it in the game. Now, our defense will be boosted for 5 minutes. The most useful feature is the Blueprint Upload. In the blueprint history,. we can send our own blueprints to our phones. Hey,. it's already here. It generates an image. with a QR code. This is incredibly useful for later stages. Honestly, the MKII I'm using now. still veers off course when I fly it. Is there anyone who can send me. a perfect MKII blueprint? The Item Chest feature. allows you to store items in the game,. and then you can give those items to your friends. I'm curious, though. Can I send items from another save file. to myself in this current save? Wouldn't that mean I'd have an infinite supply of items? In general,. if you ask me whether the Switch 2 is worth buying right now,. it's like asking me. if "Monster Hunter Wilds" is worth buying at this moment. It's a great product,. but there's just not enough content at launch. The only exclusive game at launch is Mario Kart. and I don't know if any of you think. this black color... ugh,. it's really unappealing. Where's my beloved toy-like aesthetic? Among all the PC handhelds out there,. it just blends in and doesn't stand out. Can kids really fall in love with something so bulky and drab-looking? Right now, the Switch with extended battery life and the OLED version only cost $118 and $180 respectively. My advice is,. if you haven't bought it yet and are still on the fence,. you could wait for the first blockbuster title on the Switch 2. You could also wait and see if there are any good-looking Joy-Con controllers or limited-edition consoles released later. And, of course, wait for a price drop. Oh, I almost forgot,. the screen is a bit underwhelming too. Maybe you could wait for an OLED version as well. If you're a hardcore gamer. who wants to play every new game on every platform right at launch,. then buying it now doesn't come with much of a premium,. and it's worth collecting. But don't set your expectations too high for the games just yet. Let's hope Nintendo can still come up with impressive titles in the future,. like "The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild" or "Animal Crossing: New Horizons," that leave a lasting impression~. Ok. So all for this video. If you find this video helpful. Remember to hit that one-click Like, Subscribe & Bell Notification for me! This is very important to me. Then I'm Cherry.

See you next time. Bye ~.

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9VKkI09qWYw

#數碼 #開箱 #switch2 #nintendoswitch

item.title: 任天堂SWITCH2開箱體驗！最簡單的快樂！新遊戲好玩麼？｜大狸子切切裡
item.itunes:title: 任天堂SWITCH2開箱體驗！最簡單的快樂！新遊戲好玩麼？｜大狸子切切裡
item.itunes:author: 大狸子切切裡 Cherry OFFICIAL CHANNEL
item.itunes:summary:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 了解 Nintendo Switch 2 的第一手開箱體驗及外觀設計。
  • 深入解析 Switch 2 相較於前代的硬體升級及新功能（如 Joy-Con 滑鼠模式）。
  • 了解 Switch 2 遊戲效能、兼容性及首發遊戲的體驗心得。
  • 包含對新配件（如 Pro 手把、卡帶）的介紹及特殊測試（如卡帶的味道）。

摘要

入手與開箱

切裡表達了對終於拿到 Nintendo Switch 2 的興奮之情，回憶起之前為了第一時間見到新遊戲機而開車到香港參加試玩會的經歷。她提到一位原本要賣她機器的朋友卻失聯了，似乎無法從他那裡買到機器了。

硬體規格與升級亮點

她表示 Switch 2 是她今年最期待的遊戲硬體，提到前代 Switch 是全球最暢銷的掌機，售出超過 1.5 億台。新一代 Switch 2 號稱效能提升 10 倍，螢幕從 720p 60Hz 升級到 1080p 120Hz HDR 的大螢幕，儲存空間也大幅增加。此外，Switch 2 支援任天堂第一方新遊戲，並基本兼容所有 Switch 1 代遊戲。她希望透過這部影片幫助已擁有 Switch 的玩家判斷是否值得升級或購買 Switch 2。

主機與 Joy-Con 開箱

影片進入開箱環節，切裡首先展示了主機和 Joy-Con 控制器，發現 Joy-Con 是斜著放置的，她認為這是為了節省空間以提高運輸效率。她提到目前 Switch 2 主機似乎只有黑色版本，Joy-Con 則延續了紅藍配色來區分左右。

配件細節

接下來，切裡展示了箱內的配件，包含一張瑪利歐遊戲的數位激活碼、HDMI 線、兩個 Joy-Con 腕帶，以及改良過的 Joy-Con 握把支架。她特別提醒購買港版 Switch 2 的玩家，充電頭是大型三腳插頭，需要另外購買轉接頭。最後是全新設計的底座。

新版底座介紹

切裡詳細介紹了 Switch 2 的新版底座，她感覺這次的底座設計非常不同，不像前代那樣單純的插槽，更像是一個有風扇的支架，風格更加強勁。她指出底座上的連接埠包括 USB-C 供電口、HDMI 接口、乙太網路口以及側面的兩個 USB-A 接口，這些接口配置與前代 OLED 版底座相似。

首次開機與數據轉移

影片來到期待已久的開機環節。開機動畫和音效與前代不同，系統提示將 Joy-Con 安裝到主機上。切裡示範了如何從舊的 Switch OLED 傳輸數據到 Switch 2。她期待這台新主機未來七年的陪伴。

主機外觀與尺寸比較

切裡給 Switch 2 的外觀打了高分。她將其尺寸與前代 Switch 和目前的 PC 掌機進行比較，發現 Switch 2 比前代大了一整圈，長度與 PC 掌機差不多，這意味著放入口袋的可能性較小。然而，在厚度方面，Switch 2 與前代相似，但因為體積變大，實際感受上會覺得更薄。

Joy-Con 連接與手感

切裡展示了 Switch 2 Joy-Con 的純磁吸式連接結構，並測試了其磁力的強度，甚至能將主機吊起來。她嘗試用力拔下安裝好的 Joy-Con，雖然可以拔掉，但磁力依然很強。她提到這次 Joy-Con 的按鈕和扳機都變大了，整體手感和材質都有提升。特別是類比搖桿，任天堂聲稱重新設計了結構，切裡透過測試搖桿的「虛位」發現新搖桿的表現確實比舊款順滑許多，畫小圓更加容易。

Joy-Con 滑鼠功能

一個非常有趣的新功能是 Joy-Con 可以當作滑鼠使用。透過內建的感測器，Joy-Con 可以在平面上追蹤位移，就像傳統滑鼠一樣。切裡展示了如何在系統設定中啟用此功能並進行操作，她發現這個功能非常跟手且實用。她認為這項功能對於過去在 Switch 上不方便遊玩的策略或經營類遊戲（例如文明、雙點醫院）將帶來巨大的便利。

Joy-Con 反向插入測試

切裡好奇地測試了 Joy-Con 是否可以反向插入主機。結果發現雖然可以插入，主機也能辨識 Joy-Con 的顏色，但操作會完全顛倒，讓她覺得很有趣但也非常混亂。

頂部接口與支架/SD 卡槽

切裡接著介紹了主機頂部的電源鍵和音量鍵，並特別提到了這次新增的 Type-C 接口。這解決了前代 Switch 在使用支架時無法同時充電的問題。新的一體式支架設計讓充電和支架使用可以同時進行。她還展示了藏在支架下方的 SD 卡槽，不過 Switch 2 僅支援更快速但也非常昂貴的 Express 卡。她建議玩家初期先使用內建儲存空間，等待卡片價格回落。

新遊戲與遊戲兼容性

對於 Switch 2 最令人期待的自然是新遊戲。切裡列舉了確認將登陸 Switch 2 的遊戲陣容，包括瑪利歐賽車世界、新作薩爾達傳說（Switch 2 版本）、密特羅德究極復刻、電馭叛客 2077、雙點醫院、快打旋風 6、霍格華茲的傳承、文明 7、符文工坊等。她也提到了第三方大作如碧血狂殺 2 和艾爾登法環也將推出。

新卡帶與瑪利歐賽車世界

切裡展示了 Switch 2 的遊戲卡帶，這次改為紅色包裝。她購買的是「瑪利歐賽車世界」，並解釋了「世界」指的是新增的地圖功能，這是一個模擬的開放世界大廳，玩家可以在其中自由駕駛或探索，觸發小遊戲和獎勵，是瑪利歐賽車系列的新嘗試。

瑪利歐賽車世界遊戲體驗

在瑪利歐賽車世界的本地遊玩體驗方面，切裡發現除了 UI 和畫面提升外，賽道明顯變寬，但由於賽道中塞入了更多角色，遊戲體驗變得更為混亂，要取得好名次也更困難。她總結來說，遊戲更容易上手，但競爭更激烈。她認為這種多人同樂的樂趣還是任天堂的核心魅力。

兼容性測試與舊遊戲體驗

切裡測試了 Switch 2 運行 Switch 1 代遊戲（如薩爾達傳說 王國之淚）的表現。她提到現在還有一個手機應用程式，可以直接在手機上看地圖並複製其他玩家的神廟或藍圖。她展示了遊戲畫面，讚嘆 1080p 60 幀的流暢度，感覺像從 30 幀模糊畫面升級到高解析度版本，差異非常顯著。

HDR 螢幕觀感

針對 Switch 2 的 HDR 螢幕，切裡表示實際觀感上 HDR 效果似乎不太明顯，即使將亮度調到最高。她將其與前代 Switch OLED 螢幕比較，認為 OLED 在高光部分的表現依然更亮。她質疑為了 HDR 而放棄 OLED 螢幕的必要性，如果 HDR 效果不突出。

後續遊戲與影片計劃

切裡表示未來還有許多令人期待的遊戲將在 Switch 2 上推出，並預告她將製作更多影片，實測第三方大作如電馭叛客 2077 和霍格華茲的傳承等在 Switch 2 上的表現。

卡帶防誤食測試

切裡分享了一個有趣的細節：任天堂為了防止小朋友誤食遊戲卡帶，在卡帶表面塗上了一種極苦的物質。她親自嘗試舔了一下卡帶，證實味道非常苦，而且苦味會持續幾個小時。她提醒廣大玩家不要主動嘗試。

續航與充電測試

切裡測試了 Switch 2 的續航和充電。官方宣稱續航時間為 2-6 小時，與前代 Switch 1 相似。她測試發現，無論使用原廠充電頭還是第三方高瓦數 PD 充電頭，關機狀態下的充電功率都只有 15W。實際測試結果顯示，約一小時可充飽 50%，完全充滿需要 2 小時 15 分鐘。她猜測附贈的 60W 充電頭可能是為底座模式設計，或未來改進款可能支援快充。

其他配件開箱

切裡接著展示了她從全球購購買的一些 Switch 2 配件套裝，包括 Pro 控制器 2、Joy-Con 方向盤、攝影機、收納包和遊戲卡帶等。她特別期待 Pro 控制器 2，並進行了開箱。她注意到 Pro 控制器 2 的外觀有防滑紋路，顏色也更好看。

Pro 控制器 2 細節

她詳細介紹了 Pro 控制器 2 的細節，包括後面的兩個可自定義背鍵。她特別稱讚了搖桿的順滑度相比前代有了極大的提升，整體手感也更扎實。不過，她遺憾地指出，扳機依然不是線性設計。

總結與展望

切裡回憶起過去購買二手 Switch 配件的經驗，對這次能一次買齊所有 Switch 2 配件感到非常滿足。她總結這次開箱和體驗新遊戲的過程非常開心。她認為 Switch 2 的升級更符合現代玩家的需求，掌機形態更接近 PC 掌機，但體積更輕巧、價格更親民，維持了任天堂注重遊戲性的核心。她表達了對未來 Switch 2 上的薩爾達續作和斯普拉遁等遊戲的期待，並預告之後的影片會探討存檔轉移和新商店等問題。最後，她感謝觀眾收看並結束了影片。

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TviKk8TVHUw

歡迎訂閱切狸~ 在這裡你會看到很多有趣的數碼資訊哦！ | Please don’t forget to subscribe 💋：https://bit.ly/3jQ3429

-------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------

我的SWITCH2終於到我手上啦，今天這期影片就來帶大家一起看看新的SWITCH2到底升級了些什麼，大家衝首發了麼？

往期影片：

https://youtu.be/1EvMJ9xrYl0

https://youtu.be/RIuYbqLV62k

F O L L O W M E

#數碼 #開箱 #switch2 #nintendoswitch #任天堂

  • 了解 Nintendo Switch 2 的第一手開箱體驗及外觀設計。
  • 深入解析 Switch 2 相較於前代的硬體升級及新功能（如 Joy-Con 滑鼠模式）。
  • 了解 Switch 2 遊戲效能、兼容性及首發遊戲的體驗心得。
  • 包含對新配件（如 Pro 手把、卡帶）的介紹及特殊測試（如卡帶的味道）。

摘要

切裡表達了對終於拿到 Nintendo Switch 2 的興奮之情，回憶起之前為了第一時間見到新遊戲機而開車到香港參加試玩會的經歷。她提到一位原本要賣她機器的朋友卻失聯了，似乎無法從他那裡買到機器了。

她表示 Switch 2 是她今年最期待的遊戲硬體，提到前代 Switch 是全球最暢銷的掌機，售出超過 1.5 億台。新一代 Switch 2 號稱效能提升 10 倍，螢幕從 720p 60Hz 升級到 1080p 120Hz HDR 的大螢幕，儲存空間也大幅增加。此外，Switch 2 支援任天堂第一方新遊戲，並基本兼容所有 Switch 1 代遊戲。她希望透過這部影片幫助已擁有 Switch 的玩家判斷是否值得升級或購買 Switch 2。

主機與 Joy-Con 開箱

影片進入開箱環節，切裡首先展示了主機和 Joy-Con 控制器，發現 Joy-Con 是斜著放置的，她認為這是為了節省空間以提高運輸效率。她提到目前 Switch 2 主機似乎只有黑色版本，Joy-Con 則延續了紅藍配色來區分左右。

配件細節

接下來，切裡展示了箱內的配件，包含一張瑪利歐遊戲的數位激活碼、HDMI 線、兩個 Joy-Con 腕帶，以及改良過的 Joy-Con 握把支架。她特別提醒購買港版 Switch 2 的玩家，充電頭是大型三腳插頭，需要另外購買轉接頭。最後是全新設計的底座。

新版底座介紹

切裡詳細介紹了 Switch 2 的新版底座，她感覺這次的底座設計非常不同，不像前代那樣單純的插槽，更像是一個有風扇的支架，風格更加強勁。她指出底座上的連接埠包括 USB-C 供電口、HDMI 接口、乙太網路口以及側面的兩個 USB-A 接口，這些接口配置與前代 OLED 版底座相似。

首次開機與數據轉移

影片來到期待已久的開機環節。開機動畫和音效與前代不同，系統提示將 Joy-Con 安裝到主機上。切裡示範了如何從舊的 Switch OLED 傳輸數據到 Switch 2。她期待這台新主機未來七年的陪伴。

主機外觀與尺寸比較

切裡給 Switch 2 的外觀打了高分。她將其尺寸與前代 Switch 和目前的 PC 掌機進行比較，發現 Switch 2 比前代大了一整圈，長度與 PC 掌機差不多，這意味著放入口袋的可能性較小。然而，在厚度方面，Switch 2 與前代相似，但因為體積變大，實際感受上會覺得更薄。

Joy-Con 連接與手感

切裡展示了 Switch 2 Joy-Con 的純磁吸式連接結構，並測試了其磁力的強度，甚至能將主機吊起來。她嘗試用力拔下安裝好的 Joy-Con，雖然可以拔掉，但磁力依然很強。她提到這次 Joy-Con 的按鈕和扳機都變大了，整體手感和材質都有提升。特別是類比搖桿，任天堂聲稱重新設計了結構，切裡透過測試搖桿的「虛位」發現新搖桿的表現確實比舊款順滑許多，畫小圓更加容易。

Joy-Con 滑鼠功能

一個非常有趣的新功能是 Joy-Con 可以當作滑鼠使用。透過內建的感測器，Joy-Con 可以在平面上追蹤位移，就像傳統滑鼠一樣。切裡展示了如何在系統設定中啟用此功能並進行操作，她發現這個功能非常跟手且實用。她認為這項功能對於過去在 Switch 上不方便遊玩的策略或經營類遊戲（例如文明、雙點醫院）將帶來巨大的便利。

Joy-Con 反向插入測試

切裡好奇地測試了 Joy-Con 是否可以反向插入主機。結果發現雖然可以插入，主機也能辨識 Joy-Con 的顏色，但操作會完全顛倒，讓她覺得很有趣但也非常混亂。

頂部接口與支架/SD 卡槽

切裡接著介紹了主機頂部的電源鍵和音量鍵，並特別提到了這次新增的 Type-C 接口。這解決了前代 Switch 在使用支架時無法同時充電的問題。新的一體式支架設計讓充電和支架使用可以同時進行。她還展示了藏在支架下方的 SD 卡槽，不過 Switch 2 僅支援更快速但也非常昂貴的 Express 卡。她建議玩家初期先使用內建儲存空間，等待卡片價格回落。

新遊戲與遊戲兼容性

對於 Switch 2 最令人期待的自然是新遊戲。切裡列舉了確認將登陸 Switch 2 的遊戲陣容，包括瑪利歐賽車世界、新作薩爾達傳說（Switch 2 版本）、密特羅德究極復刻、電馭叛客 2077、雙點醫院、快打旋風 6、霍格華茲的傳承、文明 7、符文工坊等。她也提到了第三方大作如碧血狂殺 2 和艾爾登法環也將推出。

新卡帶與瑪利歐賽車世界

切裡展示了 Switch 2 的遊戲卡帶，這次改為紅色包裝。她購買的是「瑪利歐賽車世界」，並解釋了「世界」指的是新增的地圖功能，這是一個模擬的開放世界大廳，玩家可以在其中自由駕駛或探索，觸發小遊戲和獎勵，是瑪利歐賽車系列的新嘗試。

瑪利歐賽車世界遊戲體驗

在瑪利歐賽車世界的本地遊玩體驗方面，切裡發現除了 UI 和畫面提升外，賽道明顯變寬，但由於賽道中塞入了更多角色，遊戲體驗變得更為混亂，要取得好名次也更困難。她總結來說，遊戲更容易上手，但競爭更激烈。她認為這種多人同樂的樂趣還是任天堂的核心魅力。

兼容性測試與舊遊戲體驗

切裡測試了 Switch 2 運行 Switch 1 代遊戲（如薩爾達傳說 王國之淚）的表現。她提到現在還有一個手機應用程式，可以直接在手機上看地圖並複製其他玩家的神廟或藍圖。她展示了遊戲畫面，讚嘆 1080p 60 幀的流暢度，感覺像從 30 幀模糊畫面升級到高解析度版本，差異非常顯著。

HDR 螢幕觀感

針對 Switch 2 的 HDR 螢幕，切裡表示實際觀感上 HDR 效果似乎不太明顯，即使將亮度調到最高。她將其與前代 Switch OLED 螢幕比較，認為 OLED 在高光部分的表現依然更亮。她質疑為了 HDR 而放棄 OLED 螢幕的必要性，如果 HDR 效果不突出。

後續遊戲與影片計劃

切裡表示未來還有許多令人期待的遊戲將在 Switch 2 上推出，並預告她將製作更多影片，實測第三方大作如電馭叛客 2077 和霍格華茲的傳承等在 Switch 2 上的表現。

卡帶防誤食測試

切裡分享了一個有趣的細節：任天堂為了防止小朋友誤食遊戲卡帶，在卡帶表面塗上了一種極苦的物質。她親自嘗試舔了一下卡帶，證實味道非常苦，而且苦味會持續幾個小時。她提醒廣大玩家不要主動嘗試。

續航與充電測試

切裡測試了 Switch 2 的續航和充電。官方宣稱續航時間為 2-6 小時，與前代 Switch 1 相似。她測試發現，無論使用原廠充電頭還是第三方高瓦數 PD 充電頭，關機狀態下的充電功率都只有 15W。實際測試結果顯示，約一小時可充飽 50%，完全充滿需要 2 小時 15 分鐘。她猜測附贈的 60W 充電頭可能是為底座模式設計，或未來改進款可能支援快充。

其他配件開箱

切裡接著展示了她從全球購購買的一些 Switch 2 配件套裝，包括 Pro 控制器 2、Joy-Con 方向盤、攝影機、收納包和遊戲卡帶等。她特別期待 Pro 控制器 2，並進行了開箱。她注意到 Pro 控制器 2 的外觀有防滑紋路，顏色也更好看。

Pro 控制器 2 細節

她詳細介紹了 Pro 控制器 2 的細節，包括後面的兩個可自定義背鍵。她特別稱讚了搖桿的順滑度相比前代有了極大的提升，整體手感也更扎實。不過，她遺憾地指出，扳機依然不是線性設計。

總結與展望

切裡回憶起過去購買二手 Switch 配件的經驗，對這次能一次買齊所有 Switch 2 配件感到非常滿足。她總結這次開箱和體驗新遊戲的過程非常開心。她認為 Switch 2 的升級更符合現代玩家的需求，掌機形態更接近 PC 掌機，但體積更輕巧、價格更親民，維持了任天堂注重遊戲性的核心。她表達了對未來 Switch 2 上的薩爾達續作和斯普拉遁等遊戲的期待，並預告之後的影片會探討存檔轉移和新商店等問題。最後，她感謝觀眾收看並結束了影片。

=============

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TviKk8TVHUw

歡迎訂閱切狸~ 在這裡你會看到很多有趣的數碼資訊哦！ | Please don’t forget to subscribe 💋：https://bit.ly/3jQ3429

-------------------------------------------------- ----------------------------------

我的SWITCH2終於到我手上啦，今天這期影片就來帶大家一起看看新的SWITCH2到底升級了些什麼，大家衝首發了麼？

往期影片：

https://youtu.be/1EvMJ9xrYl0

https://youtu.be/RIuYbqLV62k

F O L L O W M E

Weibo: @大狸子切切里

Bilibili: https://space.bilibili.com/471303350

#數碼 #開箱 #switch2 #nintendoswitch #任天堂
item.content:encoded:
值得閱讀的理由

  • 了解 Nintendo Switch 2 的第一手開箱體驗及外觀設計。
  • 深入解析 Switch 2 相較於前代的硬體升級及新功能（如 Joy-Con 滑鼠模式）。
  • 了解 Switch 2 遊戲效能、兼容性及首發遊戲的體驗心得。
  • 包含對新配件（如 Pro 手把、卡帶）的介紹及特殊測試（如卡帶的味道）。

摘要

入手與開箱

切裡表達了對終於拿到 Nintendo Switch 2 的興奮之情，回憶起之前為了第一時間見到新遊戲機而開車到香港參加試玩會的經歷。她提到一位原本要賣她機器的朋友卻失聯了，似乎無法從他那裡買到機器了。

硬體規格與升級亮點

她表示 Switch 2 是她今年最期待的遊戲硬體，提到前代 Switch 是全球最暢銷的掌機，售出超過 1.5 億台。新一代 Switch 2 號稱效能提升 10 倍，螢幕從 720p 60Hz 升級到 1080p 120Hz HDR 的大螢幕，儲存空間也大幅增加。此外，Switch 2 支援任天堂第一方新遊戲，並基本兼容所有 Switch 1 代遊戲。她希望透過這部影片幫助已擁有 Switch 的玩家判斷是否值得升級或購買 Switch 2。

主機與 Joy-Con 開箱

影片進入開箱環節，切裡首先展示了主機和 Joy-Con 控制器，發現 Joy-Con 是斜著放置的，她認為這是為了節省空間以提高運輸效率。她提到目前 Switch 2 主機似乎只有黑色版本，Joy-Con 則延續了紅藍配色來區分左右。

接下來，切裡展示了箱內的配件，包含一張瑪利歐遊戲的數位激活碼、HDMI 線、兩個 Joy-Con 腕帶，以及改良過的 Joy-Con 握把支架。她特別提醒購買港版 Switch 2 的玩家，充電頭是大型三腳插頭，需要另外購買轉接頭。最後是全新設計的底座。

新版底座介紹

切裡詳細介紹了 Switch 2 的新版底座，她感覺這次的底座設計非常不同，不像前代那樣單純的插槽，更像是一個有風扇的支架，風格更加強勁。她指出底座上的連接埠包括 USB-C 供電口、HDMI 接口、乙太網路口以及側面的兩個 USB-A 接口，這些接口配置與前代 OLED 版底座相似。

首次開機與數據轉移

影片來到期待已久的開機環節。開機動畫和音效與前代不同，系統提示將 Joy-Con 安裝到主機上。切裡示範了如何從舊的 Switch OLED 傳輸數據到 Switch 2。她期待這台新主機未來七年的陪伴。

主機外觀與尺寸比較

切裡給 Switch 2 的外觀打了高分。她將其尺寸與前代 Switch 和目前的 PC 掌機進行比較，發現 Switch 2 比前代大了一整圈，長度與 PC 掌機差不多，這意味著放入口袋的可能性較小。然而，在厚度方面，Switch 2 與前代相似，但因為體積變大，實際感受上會覺得更薄。

切裡展示了 Switch 2 Joy-Con 的純磁吸式連接結構，並測試了其磁力的強度，甚至能將主機吊起來。她嘗試用力拔下安裝好的 Joy-Con，雖然可以拔掉，但磁力依然很強。她提到這次 Joy-Con 的按鈕和扳機都變大了，整體手感和材質都有提升。特別是類比搖桿，任天堂聲稱重新設計了結構，切裡透過測試搖桿的「虛位」發現新搖桿的表現確實比舊款順滑許多，畫小圓更加容易。

切裡測試了 Switch 2 運行 Switch 1 代遊戲（如薩爾達傳說 王國之淚）的表現。她提到現在還有一個手機應用程式，可以直接在手機上看地圖並複製其他玩家的神廟或藍圖。她展示了遊戲畫面，讚嘆 1080p 60 幀的流暢度，感覺像從 30 幀模糊畫面升級到高解析度版本，差異非常顯著。

切裡分享了一個有趣的細節：任天堂為了防止小朋友誤食遊戲卡帶，在卡帶表面塗上了一種極苦的物質。她親自嘗試舔了一下卡帶，證實味道非常苦，而且苦味會持續幾個小時。她提醒廣大玩家不要主動嘗試。

她詳細介紹了 Pro 控制器 2 的細節，包括後面的兩個可自定義背鍵。她特別稱讚了搖桿的順滑度相比前代有了極大的提升，整體手感也更扎實。不過，她遺憾地指出，扳機依然不是線性設計。

總結與展望

切裡回憶起過去購買二手 Switch 配件的經驗，對這次能一次買齊所有 Switch 2 配件感到非常滿足。她總結這次開箱和體驗新遊戲的過程非常開心。她認為 Switch 2 的升級更符合現代玩家的需求，掌機形態更接近 PC 掌機，但體積更輕巧、價格更親民，維持了任天堂注重遊戲性的核心。她表達了對未來 Switch 2 上的薩爾達續作和斯普拉遁等遊戲的期待，並預告之後的影片會探討存檔轉移和新商店等問題。最後，她感謝觀眾收看並結束了影片。
